title: Is there a provided Burp Suite Scan for the Privacy and security checklist?

posts.author: jason-at-rewind (Jason)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I am working through the Privacy and security requirements listed here: Privacy and security and it says:

All domains must pass the provided Burp scan

Maybe I am not looking in the right place, but is there a provided Burp scan I should be referring to? Or is the out of the box Burp Suite scan sufficient?

Thanks!
Jason

posts.author: tylerb (Tyler - Solisana Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday does the Burp scan for you.

I would go to your app, scroll down to Marketplace > Submit App.

Click the blue “Submission Form” button and you’ll see what you actually need to submit.

Once you submit, you’ll get set up on a board with your reviewer. You basically just go down the list and complete tasks (like the malware scan and fixing Burp stuff). Good luck!
